title: jussiaea suffruticosa var. bonariensis
intro: Jussiaea suffruticosa var. bonariensis, also known as South American water-lily, is a plant species that belongs to the family Nymphaeaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Jussiaea suffruticosa var. bonariensis include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from headaches and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, which are typically used to treat various health conditions.
